scoring-irt-lines.rationale: NFR32 — scoring engine cognitive-load cap (~250 LOC). Solo-dev must be able to mind the whole auditable scoring engine end-to-end.

css-components-lines.rationale: EPIC-14 AURORA-REDESIGN BUMP (2300 → 2600): Epic 14 (Aurora Glass Observatory) supersedes Epic 13's visual strategy and reapplies a deep-navy-backdrop glass system across the WHOLE app — homepage hero (14-3), the complete /methodology route + selection scene (14-4), consent + supporting-info + shared chrome (14-5), assessment rendering + restrained test route (14-6/14-7), results + saved-results (14-8), and the ink-economical print document (14-9). Most surfaces were previously transparent regions floating on the (now deep-navy) backdrop, so Aurora adds real glass-surface rules (sidebar/index/consent/chrome/results panels) on top of the 14-2 token revaluation. As with the Epic-13 bump, the WHOLE-epic runway is pinned ONCE here (300 lines over the 14-2 measured 2196) to avoid per-story re-pinning during the restyle; the Aurora tokens themselves live in primitives/semantic (not counted here). EPIC-13 GLASS-REDESIGN BUMP (1850 → 2300): Epic 13 adds a cohesive glassmorphism visual system + modern motion across the whole app (PR-16/PR-17) — a new reusable glass-surface primitive (Story 13-2), a glass+motion homepage hero with aurora glow (Story 13-3), the glass rollout across item-runner/score-panel/chrome/methodology/language/theme surfaces (Story 13-4), and the redesigned print/export result document (Story 13-5). Whole-epic runway pinned once to avoid per-story re-pinning during the restyle; the glass tokens themselves live in primitives/semantic (not counted here). EPIC-11 RESUME-FEATURE BUMP (1800 → 1850): saved-results 'Unfinished tests' (resume) section styling. Measured 1805 LOC. EPIC-11 UI-REFINEMENT BUMP 2 (1700 → 1800): continued maintainer live-review polish — result pre-reveal centering, methodology app-shell (fixed masthead+sidebar, scrollable content), consent fit, and mobile type/button down-scaling across consent/landing/score-panel/base. Measured 1714 LOC; runway to 1800 to avoid per-tweak re-pinning during the polish pass. EPIC-11 UI-REFINEMENT BUMP (1650 → 1700): post-implementation maintainer review of the live item screen drove several iterative CSS rounds in item-runner.css — bail-affordance reflow, option-icon sizing to match matrix cells, empty-space removal, vertical-padding drop, a wider tablet/desktop canvas, and viewport-fit (scrollable options + vh-scaled icons so the whole item fits without scroll on every size). Measured 1656 LOC; +~2.6% margin. EPIC-11 BUMP (1500 → 1650): Story 11-1 post-release UX pass added component CSS across theme-toggle (segmented switcher, PR-6), language-switcher (flag dropdown, PR-7), saved-results (new scene, PR-14), masthead (methodology sidebar, PR-11), item-runner (mobile sticky-nav/scrollable-options media query, PR-2), score-panel (result centering + collapsible disclaimer, PR-5/PR-13), chrome-header (logo + controls cluster, PR-8), and consent-scene (caption wrap, PR-10). Measured 1617 LOC; +~2% margin keeps the explicit-justification discipline. NFR32 — total CSS body across components (~1500 LOC). Beyond this, design-system complexity exceeds solo-dev review budget.

app-modules-bytes.rationale: EPIC-12 MULTI-TEST BATTERY BUMP (90112 → 110592, 88 KB → 108 KB): Epic 12 (PR-15) adds the multi-test battery — a new pre-test selection scene (selection.js: methodology + short/full variant radio groups, state-v2 plumbing, Story 12-2), variant-aware session start in item-runner.js (per-variant pool URL + session size, Story 12-3), and the ICAR Letter/Number Series methodology end-to-end (Story 12-4). Whole-epic runway pinned once to avoid per-story re-pinning; measured 96593 B after 12-2. The next post-epic principled re-pin audit (bridge-style) should fold this in with the Epic-11 cumulative-growth review already flagged below. EPIC-11 RESUME-MULTISESSION BUMP (88064 → 90112, 86 KB → 88 KB): user-requested multi-session resume — every started test is kept under its own iqme:in-progress:<seed> key (session-persistence.js: listProgress / loadProgress(seed) / clearProgress(seed) / migrateLegacy + a shared progressKeys() helper) so starting a new test no longer clobbers earlier unfinished ones; the saved-results 'Unfinished tests' section lists every unfinished test (resume/delete each, start-time label); plus per-item selected-option persistence so Previous/resume re-displays the ACTUAL pick (not just 0/1 correctness) via a two-pass radio update in item-runner. Comments trimmed + the three localStorage scans deduped into progressKeys() BEFORE raising (recover-headroom-first, bridge-7-8-5 discipline). Measured 88456 B; +~1.9% margin. This raise + the prior EPIC-11 bumps feed the post-epic-11 principled re-pin audit flagged by the code-review auditor (finding: cumulative growth warrants a bridge-7-8-5-style consolidation pass). EPIC-11 RESUME-FEATURE BUMP (79872 → 88064, 78 KB → 86 KB): new resume capability — session-persistence.js (auto-save/load/clear in-progress test) + item-runner seed-restore & auto-save hooks + saved-results in-progress section/resume flow + landing entry gate (NFR9 relaxed for the iqme:in-progress key per maintainer decision). Measured 85060 B. EPIC-11 UI-REFINEMENT BUMP (76800 → 79872, 75 KB → 78 KB): maintainer live-review added the no-flicker in-place item renderer (item-runner.js updateItemInPlace — mutates the matrix image src, option images, radios, progress + nav in place instead of recreating the DOM, killing the Next/Previous blink) + option-image cache warming. Measured 77607 B; +~2.9% margin. EPIC-11 BUMP (62464 → 76800, 61 KB → 75 KB): Story 11-1 post-release UX pass added saved-results.js (new #/saved scene — list/open/delete-all/delete-selected, PR-14), the theme.js segmented-switcher rewrite (PR-6), the language-switcher.js flag-dropdown rewrite + route-change FR8 reflection (PR-7), result.js (collapsible disclaimer + ordered/padded scoring, PR-13/PR-4), item-runner.js (next-item preload + in-place rerender + Submit unanswered-pad, PR-3/PR-4), landing.js (saved-results entry point, PR-14), and routing.js (+#/saved route + savedResults NS). Measured 74890 B; +~2.5%% margin keeps the explicit-justification discipline. INTERIM-DEMO BUMP 2 (60416 → 62464, 59 KB → 61 KB): demo-readiness round 2 added the honest print-to-PDF result summary (result.js PRINT button + print-only masthead + bindPrint window.print() wiring; posture-respecting, NOT a certificate), the result-scene incomplete-session crash guard (routing redirect), the FR12 dwell-gate hint (consent.js), the non-EN draft-translation banner (main.js), and the landing-only language-switcher gate. Measured 61151 B after comment-trimming; +~1.3 KB keeps the ~2% explicit-justification margin. The earlier INTERIM-DEMO bump's result-label/picture-option work is also resident. INTERIM-DEMO BUMP (59392 → 60416, 58 KB → 59 KB): demo-readiness pass added image-tile option rendering with localized a11y labels (item-runner.js), the stub augmentation-disable guard, and the result-scene comprehension fix — visible metric under-labels + a one-line plain-language explainer (result.js). Measured 59394 B at the 58 KB ceiling after trimming added comments; +~1 KB raise keeps the explicit-justification discipline. Result copy/labels are UI strings mirrored to the RU/PL English-stub bundles (clinical-register translation remains Gate-9c/9d). STORY-7.6 BUMP (57344 → 59392, 56 KB → 58 KB): Story 7.6 added tail-scenes-url.js (pure per-locale tail-scenes path helper) + result.js active-locale tail-scenes fetch with EN fallback (FR19 — RU/PL tail-scene loading infra; clinical-register copy itself is Gate-9c/9d-gated). Measured 57389 B at the 56 KB ceiling; +~2 KB raise keeps the explicit-justification discipline. STORY-7.2 BUMP (55296 → 57344, 54 KB → 56 KB): the explicit next raise the Story-7.1 rationale anticipated. Added locale-switch-blocker-hint.js (FR8 teachable-moment hint, UX-DR27) + main.js onBlockedAttempt wiring. Measured 56537 B; +~807 B (~1.4%) margin keeps the tight discipline. STORY-7.1 BUMP (48128 → 55296, 47 KB → 54 KB): the Epic-7 i18n harness landed under src/assessment/ exactly as this budget's prior rationale anticipated ('Epic-7 i18n locale-loading weight, when it lands, raises this ceiling WITH a documented justification, not pre-emptively'). Added: language-switcher.js (keyboard-first EN/RU/PL radio group + NFR9 opt-in persist + FR8 in-session guard seam) + locale-loader.js extensions (SUPPORTED/normalizeLocale/resolveInitialLocale/t) + main.js boot-locale resolution. Measured 54326 B; +~970 B (~1.8%) margin keeps the deliberately-tight discipline so the next raise (Story 7.2 locale-switch-blocker-hint.js) is again EXPLICIT, not a silent stamp. NFR32 — assessment SPA modules budget (47 KB raw). Aligned with NFR21 vanilla-ES2022 + NFR33 zero-runtime-dep posture. PRINCIPLED RE-PIN (bridge-7-8-5): supersedes the five ad-hoc per-story raises across Epic-6 (30 KB Epic-1 → 34 KB 6.2 → 40 KB 6.4 → 44 KB 6.5 → 48 KB 6.7) which the 6-7 round-1 review flagged as decaying toward a rubber stamp (~60% growth, each raise individually justified but never audited as a whole). Post-trim: bridge-7-8-5 consolidated the HTML escape (escapeText/escapeAttr) + interpolation (fmt) helpers — formerly copy-pasted across consent/error-fallback/landing/theme/item-runner/result — into the shared src/assessment/html-util.js, recovering headroom (measured ~47.2 KB after dedup) with no behavior change. The 47 KB (48128 B) ceiling = measured size + a deliberately tight (~2%) margin to force EXPLICIT justification for the next raise rather than another silent stamp. Epic-7 i18n locale-loading weight, when it lands under src/assessment/, raises this ceiling WITH a documented justification (the principled process), not pre-emptively. test-hook.js is dev-time-only (activated by ?test=1; Story 3-7) — excluded from production-modules accounting. cite-this-page.js (Story 4-6) is methodology-corpus-only — injected by tools/build-methodology.mjs into static methodology pages, never loaded by the assessment SPA. Story 7.6 added tail-scenes-url.js (pure per-locale tail-scenes path helper) + result.js active-locale tail-scenes fetch with EN fallback (FR19 — RU/PL tail-scene loading infra; clinical-register copy itself is Gate-9c/9d-gated). Measured 57389 B at the 56 KB ceiling; +~2 KB raise keeps the explicit-justification discipline. STORY-7.2 BUMP (55296 → 57344, 54 KB → 56 KB): the explicit next raise the Story-7.1 rationale anticipated. Added locale-switch-blocker-hint.js (FR8 teachable-moment hint, UX-DR27) + main.js onBlockedAttempt wiring. Measured 56537 B; +~807 B (~1.4%) margin keeps the tight discipline. STORY-7.1 BUMP (48128 → 55296, 47 KB → 54 KB): the Epic-7 i18n harness landed under src/assessment/ exactly as this budget's prior rationale anticipated ('Epic-7 i18n locale-loading weight, when it lands, raises this ceiling WITH a documented justification, not pre-emptively'). Added: language-switcher.js (keyboard-first EN/RU/PL radio group + NFR9 opt-in persist + FR8 in-session guard seam) + locale-loader.js extensions (SUPPORTED/normalizeLocale/resolveInitialLocale/t) + main.js boot-locale resolution. Measured 54326 B; +~970 B (~1.8%) margin keeps the deliberately-tight discipline so the next raise (Story 7.2 locale-switch-blocker-hint.js) is again EXPLICIT, not a silent stamp. NFR32 — assessment SPA modules budget (47 KB raw). Aligned with NFR21 vanilla-ES2022 + NFR33 zero-runtime-dep posture. PRINCIPLED RE-PIN (bridge-7-8-5): supersedes the five ad-hoc per-story raises across Epic-6 (30 KB Epic-1 → 34 KB 6.2 → 40 KB 6.4 → 44 KB 6.5 → 48 KB 6.7) which the 6-7 round-1 review flagged as decaying toward a rubber stamp (~60% growth, each raise individually justified but never audited as a whole). Post-trim: bridge-7-8-5 consolidated the HTML escape (escapeText/escapeAttr) + interpolation (fmt) helpers — formerly copy-pasted across consent/error-fallback/landing/theme/item-runner/result — into the shared src/assessment/html-util.js, recovering headroom (measured ~47.2 KB after dedup) with no behavior change. The 47 KB (48128 B) ceiling = measured size + a deliberately tight (~2%) margin to force EXPLICIT justification for the next raise rather than another silent stamp. Epic-7 i18n locale-loading weight, when it lands under src/assessment/, raises this ceiling WITH a documented justification (the principled process), not pre-emptively. test-hook.js is dev-time-only (activated by ?test=1; Story 3-7) — excluded from production-modules accounting. cite-this-page.js (Story 4-6) is methodology-corpus-only — injected by tools/build-methodology.mjs into static methodology pages, never loaded by the assessment SPA.

i18n-harness-bytes.rationale: NFR32 — i18n harness footprint (~15 KB raw). Locale loader is a runtime harness in Domain A; budget kept tight per NFR33.

methodology-pages-en.rationale: NFR32 — EN methodology corpus page count. Original ~30 corpus pages + ~5 glossary entries (Story 5.2) + ~2 tail-scene placeholders (Story 5.6) + headroom for v0.5→v1.0 editorial expansion.

methodology-pages-ru.rationale: NFR32 — RU methodology corpus page count. Mirrors EN budget (45) now that Story 7.3 landed the full RU mirror (~30 corpus + ~5 glossary + tail-scene placeholders + headroom). Story 7.3 raised 30→45.

methodology-pages-pl.rationale: NFR32 — PL methodology corpus page count. Mirrors EN budget (45) now that Story 7.4 landed the full PL mirror (~30 corpus + ~5 glossary + tail-scene placeholders + headroom). Story 7.4 raised 30→45.
